scripts.setup: npm run fetch:lean && npm run install:wasi && npm run build:demo
scripts.check:type-anchors: node scripts/generate-ts-descriptors.mjs --check --anchors docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.anchors.json --out docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.json docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.types.d.ts && npm run check:lean-type-anchor-manifest && node scripts/check-type-anchors.mjs --check --descriptors docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.json --manifest docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.manifest.json --out docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.report.json && node scripts/render-type-anchors.mjs --check --report docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.report.json --out docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.anchors.md && node scripts/render-type-anchors.mjs --check --format html --report docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.report.json --out docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.anchors.html && npm run test:type-anchors
scripts.check:react-type-anchors: node scripts/generate-ts-descriptors.mjs --check --namespace React --symbols docs/type-descriptors/react-v1.symbols.txt --provenance docs/type-descriptors/react-v1.provenance.json --anchors docs/type-descriptors/react-v1.anchors.json --out docs/type-descriptors/react-v1.json node_modules/@types/react/index.d.ts && npm run check:lean-type-anchor-manifest && node scripts/check-type-anchors.mjs --check --descriptors docs/type-descriptors/react-v1.json --manifest docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.manifest.json --out docs/type-descriptors/react-v1.report.json && node scripts/render-type-anchors.mjs --check --format html --report docs/type-descriptors/react-v1.report.json --out docs/type-descriptors/react-v1.anchors.html
scripts.check:react-dom-client-type-anchors: node scripts/generate-ts-descriptors.mjs --check --symbols docs/type-descriptors/react-dom-client-v1.symbols.txt --provenance docs/type-descriptors/react-dom-client-v1.provenance.json --anchors docs/type-descriptors/react-dom-client-v1.anchors.json --out docs/type-descriptors/react-dom-client-v1.json node_modules/@types/react-dom/client.d.ts && npm run check:lean-type-anchor-manifest && node scripts/check-type-anchors.mjs --check --descriptors docs/type-descriptors/react-dom-client-v1.json --manifest docs/type-descriptors/vir-v1.manifest.json --out docs/type-descriptors/react-dom-client-v1.report.json && node scripts/render-type-anchors.mjs --check --format html --report docs/type-descriptors/react-dom-client-v1.report.json --out docs/type-descriptors/react-dom-client-v1.anchors.html
scripts.quickstart: npm run prepare:irpkg -- examples/quickstart.virpkg.json && node scripts/quickstart-url.mjs
scripts.prepare:pages: npm run prepare:irpkg -- examples/quickstart.virpkg.json examples/fib.virpkg.json examples/mergesort.virpkg.json
scripts.build:local-artifact: npm run build:demo:release && npm run prepare:pages && npm run package:local-artifact
scripts.build:sdk-artifact: npm run build:demo:release && npm run package:sdk-artifact
scripts.build:site: npm run build:demo:release && npm run prepare:pages && npm run package:sdk-artifact && npm run package:local-artifact && vite build --base /lean-vir/
scripts.test: npm run check:package-abi && npm run check:ir-codec-tags && npm run check:native-externs && npm run check:boundary-registry && npm run check:native-wrappers && npm run check:api-coverage && npm run test:wasm-extensions && npm run build:demo && npm run test:upstream:no-build && npm run test:infoview && npm run test:runtime && npm run test:fixtures:no-build
scripts.test:site: npm run build:site && npm run test:pages
scripts.test:infoview: npm run check:infoview-bundle && lake build Vir.Infoview.ImportedHelperSmoke && lake env lean scripts/smoke-infoview-lean.lean && node scripts/smoke-infoview-widget.mjs
scripts.test:upstream: npm run build:demo && npm run test:upstream:no-build
